name: firefly-workspace
description: Governed Claude Code-native workflows, agents, hooks, and self-improvement queues for airgapped engineering teams.

firefly_context_file.title: Firefly context file
firefly_context_file.description: Optional project or team context file. Defaults to .firefly/context.md when present.

policy_bundle.title: Policy bundle
policy_bundle.description: Optional signed Firefly policy bundle for command and MCP governance.

airgap_mode.title: Strict airgap mode
airgap_mode.description: When enabled, Firefly guidance assumes no public network access and local-only documentation, tools, models, and registries.
